title: alyssum minus subsp. micranthum
intro: Alyssum minus subsp. micranthum, also known as dwarf alyssum, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of alyssum minus subsp. micranthum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes, and its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, alyssum minus subsp. micranthum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
